operations.description: Allocation to operational expenses with room for growth as the platform scales. Operations are prioritized to ensure sustainable infrastructure and team growth.

founder.description: Allocation to founder for project creation, vision, and ongoing leadership

antman_civic_fund.description: Allocation to the Antman Civic Fund, a for-profit allocator fully controlled by the founder or a founder-appointed steward. All inflows and outflows, plus their purposes, are recorded on-ledger while the founder directs destinations.
antman_civic_fund.stewardship: Founder or founder-appointed steward retains 100% control of the allocator
antman_civic_fund.ledger_recording: All inflows/outflows and purposes are recorded on-ledger for transparency

research_and_development.description: Allocation to R&D for cryptographic improvements and protocol enhancements. This budget is reviewed quarterly for need; allocation adjustments are applied in that quarterly review cycle based on findings.

civic.description: Allocation to civic initiatives, public good projects, and community engagement after dedicated allocations (operations, founder, Antman Civic Fund, R&D).
initiatives: Open data advocacy and access programs

notes: Operations are funded first (40%), followed by founder (10%) and the founder-directed but fully ledger-recorded Antman Civic Fund (10%). R&D receives 20% with quarterly review. The remaining 20% flows to civic initiatives. Antman Civic Fund inflows/outflows and purposes are fully recorded on-ledger; other allocations follow standard ledger budget recording for transparency.
